title: I have a question
wikitext:
[]: I have a question. (RUN, SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Sep 14, 2009 5:27 pm When Sahaquiel is descending, someone mentions that, instead of heading towards NERV, he's headed towards someplace called the 2nd Key. Why did he change direction?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Mon Sep 14, 2009 7:17 pm I guess to avoid being intercepted by Unit-01, you know it being born from Lilith and all that, that's my theory. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Tue Sep 15, 2009 3:01 pm for some reason, i always thought the "second key" was more like... a quadrant. you know, a wide area of the city that probably included NERV HQ and with it, terminal dogma. it didn't technically change direction, they just hadn't narrowed it down. that's why Misato's plan was so risky, because they didn't really know exactly where it would hit. or maybe it was just trying to fool the evas much like eva4dummies said. as much as i already love the fact that sahaquiel just falls from space like that, it falling and being able to dodge evas would make it even cooler in my eyes i'd have to rewatch to make sure, though.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Sep 17, 2009 3:16 am carla wrote: i'd have to rewatch to make sure, though.
